series_metadata.series_description: File contains Ohio Lottery General Purchase Requisition forms, which are required to be completed for all purchases of goods/services to be submitted to (OhioBuys). The file is maintained by purchase requisition number, date, and user OHID.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain all purchase requisitions directly related to a contract for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for four (4) years, after the Auditor of State issues audit report, review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Electronic: Delete
